# bitbucketdc_webhook (Resource)

Manages a Bitbucket Data Center webhook for a project or repository.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `events` (Set of String) Event keys that trigger this webhook (e.g. repo:refs_changed, pr:opened).
- `name` (String) The display name of the webhook.
- `project_key` (String) The project key.
- `url` (String) The URL that Bitbucket will POST events to.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the webhook is active. Defaults to true.
- `repository_slug` (String) The repository slug. When set the webhook is scoped to the repository; when omitted it is scoped to the project.
- `ssl_verification_required` (Boolean) Whether SSL certificate verification is enforced. Defaults to true.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier: {project_key}/{webhook_id} or {project_key}/{repository_slug}/{webhook_id}.
- `webhook_id` (Number) The numeric webhook ID assigned by Bitbucket.
